summary: Iteration 31: Tested Live Preview panel feature for Hero Slide Form. All 9 features verified working: (1) Preview panel displays at top of form with 'Live Preview' label and 'Updates in real-time' badge, (2) Collapsible toggle (Hide/Show) works correctly, (3) Shows background image, title, subtitle, description, button text positioned by X/Y coordinates, (4) Real-time updates when form fields change, (5) Video type: YouTube URL auto-detected and embedded, (6) Photo type: Shows uploaded photo, (7) Video input is standard Input component (not textarea) with URL-focused label, (8) Rich text formatting (bold) renders correctly, (9) Empty form shows placeholder area.

issues: Placeholder text 'Start editing the form below to see a live preview' has very low contrast (text-white/30 = 30% opacity) - may be hard to read

critical_code_review_comments: HeroSlideForm.js: HeroSlidePreview component (lines 30-91) correctly implements live preview with all required features
HeroSlideForm.js: resolveVideoUrl function (lines 17-28) handles YouTube, Vimeo, and iframe URL extraction
HeroSlideForm.js: showPreview state (line 123) controls collapsible preview panel
HeroSlideForm.js: Preview section (lines 186-202) has proper data-testid attributes for testing
HeroSlideForm.js: Video input (lines 276-281) is Input component with URL label and YouTube placeholder
HeroSlideForm.js: Rich text rendering uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML with [&_em]:italic and [&_p]:m-0 CSS classes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Preview feature for Hero Slide Form fully implemented and working. Preview panel shows at top of form with collapsible toggle. Supports video (YouTube/Vimeo auto-embed), photo, background image, text layers with X/Y positioning, and rich text formatting. Video input is standard Input component accepting URLs.
